ratings.comment: Prof Weber was super interested in evolutionary bio and it showed in his lectures. He was also passionate about his research. Although his lectures were engaging and he told good stories it was really hard to decipher what content was important. He gives a huge extra credit project but it does take time to complete so start early.
I cannot stress this enough - this man is an angel. He is SO excited to teach and it shows; I would take this class again if I could.

Dr Weber is one of my favorite professors. It was his first semester teaching this class and he was extremely flexible with fixing bugs in the class and listening to student feedback. He is so passionate about evolution, his energy and enthusiasm makes it like Hank Green is teaching the class.

As an anthropology major, this class was crazy hard - but Professor Weber (and his awesome TA Trey!) made it worth it! Lectures were required, but if they werent, I would still go everyday. They were super engaging, and Professor Weber always brought in cross disciplinary topics to keep us engaged.
